 @屠戮苍生 这个会出书嘛？","text_exts":[{"e":116,"s":110,"text":"","tp":2,"uri":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzzx6yXWUbMxuo71fexIWuquQ/16fTClJhjYAydo2jIu"},{"e":83,"s":79,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741199921BB098BB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227584159261759013694%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227437526320726150168%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765842253,"group_id":"7437526320726150168","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3gagWntXtWw8EbhQx+/eOQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"770085361301544","user_name":"一目了然的沈复"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"770085361301544","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7437526320726150168","book_info":{"abstract":"【扮猪吃虎+阴险狡诈+戏精男主+权谋算计+轻松文】
谢危楼穿越大夏皇朝，成为镇西侯府的纨绔世子，因偷看长公主洗澡，开局入狱，还被人退婚？
三年后，谢危楼离开天牢，天启城震惊，那个纨绔废少出狱了！
只是下狱三年，家竟然被偷了？这还得了！
人生如戏，全看演技，白天他是世人眼中的好色成性的纨绔子弟，到了夜晚，面具之下，杀机浮现，三尺青锋，染尽鲜血，谁敢不服，一剑诛杀。
阴谋诡计、尔虞我诈？在我面前，都是小把戏罢了。
扮猪吃虎、算计各方。谁敢放肆，让你怎么死都不知道。
天启城内，暗流涌动，危机四伏，谁才是真正的下棋之人？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b0a5b4820e570ec2720107e35fccc1c9","author":"屠戮苍生","author_id":"","book_id":"7437526320726150168","book_name":"天书，葬花，补天术，道友请上路","book_short_name":"极道葬主","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7437526323427295768","read_count":"80008","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2737561"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"1286","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,穿越,扮猪吃虎,架空,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/51508d7ffaeaa57bbceb407bfa7c15ba~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303992&x-signature=s4DPABVmgLCf3UemvGN3bhB7xA4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3535678968431063","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"952"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220306328D8FC247C9D91BB098BB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读34小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwa
